_doc: hexa-lang 드리프트 규칙 — loop-guard.hexa L5 에서 참조

rules.actual_cmd:
python3 -c "import json; lines=open('shared/hexa-lang/grammar.jsonl').readlines(); total=0
for l in lines:
    d=json.loads(l)
    if d.get('section')=='keywords':
        total=sum(len(g.get('tokens',[])) for g in d.get('groups',[]))
        break
print(total)" 2>/dev/null || echo 0
rules.label: 키워드 수

rules.actual_cmd:
python3 -c "import json; lines=open('shared/hexa-lang/grammar.jsonl').readlines(); total=0
for l in lines:
    d=json.loads(l)
    if d.get('section')=='operators':
        total=sum(len(g.get('ops',[])) for g in d.get('groups',[]))
        break
print(total)" 2>/dev/null || echo 0
rules.label: 연산자 수
